pages.text: Adds back asphalt, paintbrushes and their patterns for roads. Plus, dynamic road signs with 3 model types, completely data-driven.

In 0.0.3+, Signs are Dynamically added through datapacks. Resourcepacks provide the textures for them. All players must have the resourcepack to see the sign (like with item component-based custom textures in vanilla).

Paintbrushes have item components for length and pattern. Length is changed in the inventory with a right click, and shift right clicking blocks changes the pattern to be painted on blocks. Some can be directly applied to asphalt, changing it into that pattern asphalt, including slabs.
Can be downloaded from the usual websites that Thingamajigs is from.
